day5_ending_true.name: Me
day5_ending_true.text: *Police sealed off the school. The underground lab was discovered. Everything is being brought to light.*

day5_ending_true_2.name: Me
day5_ending_true_2.text: *Ms. Eunsu, Riin, and the school board were arrested. It's all over the news.*

day5_ending_true_4.name: Me
day5_ending_true_4.text: *Yuna is smiling. A real smile I've never seen before. Even without her camera.*

day5_ending_true_5.name: Me
day5_ending_true_5.text: *The missing transfer students are being found. Some were discovered in other facilities. They say their memories are coming back.*

day5_ending_true_6.name: Me
day5_ending_true_6.text: *Sea... in the end, she was a victim of this school too. 'Educated' here since childhood.*

day5_ending_true_7.name: Lee Seolhwa
day5_ending_true_7.text: "...Thank you. Now I can finally graduate too."

day5_ending_true_8.name: Me
day5_ending_true_8.text: *The wind blows. Not cherry blossoms — wind soaked in rain. But it feels warm.*

day5_ending_true_subtitle: Graduation — From the classroom that never graduated, at last.

day5_ending_escape.name: Me
day5_ending_escape.text: *Walking in the rain. The school is behind me now.*

day5_ending_escape_2.name: Me
day5_ending_escape_2.text: *I submitted the evidence. The police should be moving. But...*

day5_ending_escape_3.name: Me
day5_ending_escape_3.text: *Yuna is still in there. I couldn't save her. This guilt... I'll carry it forever.*

day5_ending_resist.name: Me
day5_ending_resist.text: *When I came to, I was on the hill behind the school. Dawn is breaking.*

day5_ending_resist_2.name: Me
day5_ending_resist_2.text: *Seolhwa helped me. She guided the way through the blackout.*

day5_ending_resist_3.name: Lee Seolhwa
day5_ending_resist_3.text: "...It's your turn now. Don't end up like me."

day5_ending_resist_4.name: Me
day5_ending_resist_4.text: *Seolhwa's figure dissolves into the morning light. ...Thank you.*

day5_ending_resist_subtitle: Incomplete Escape — It's not over yet.

day5_ending_cage_2.name: Me
day5_ending_cage_2.text: *...I've lost count of the mornings. The classroom is always the same. Same smiles, same lessons, same day.*

day5_ending_cage_3.name: Me
day5_ending_cage_3.text: *Ms. Eunsu smiles. Sea smiles. Riin smiles. Everyone smiles. I smile too.*

day5_ending_forget_4.name: Me
day5_ending_forget_4.text: *Today is... my first day at a new school. A transfer. My heart is racing.*

day5_ending_forget_5.name: Me
day5_ending_forget_5.text: *I look in the mirror. For some reason... tears are streaming down my face.*

day5_ending_ghost.name: Me
day5_ending_ghost.text: *...Where is this? The school... right. But nobody can see me.*

day5_ending_ghost_2.name: Me
day5_ending_ghost_2.text: *I became like Seolhwa. I am... bound to this school now.*

day5_ending_ghost_3.name: Me
day5_ending_ghost_3.text: *...A new transfer student arrives. The classroom door opens, and an unfamiliar face walks in.*

day5_ending_ghost_4.text: "Hello! I'm transferring to this school starting today..."

day5_ending_ghost_5.name: Me
day5_ending_ghost_5.text: *...This time, I have to be the one to warn them.*

day5_ending_ghost_subtitle: Remnant — Records of one who never graduated.

day5_postcredit_2.text: "Yes. ...Confirmed. We'll proceed with shutting down that site."

day5_postcredit_3.text: "Case 13 has significant exposure. Media response required. Standard protocol."

day5_postcredit_4.text: "Subject #13's case has drawn media attention. Per protocol, we frame it as individual misconduct by the on-site supervisor. Sever all ties to the foundation."

day5_postcredit_5.name: Me
day5_postcredit_5.text: "...Yes. Selection of the next pilot school is complete."
